formula_or_rule: Count how many of the 4 SIRS criteria are met: temperature > 38C or < 36C; heart rate > 90 bpm; respiratory rate > 20/min OR PaCO2 < 32 mmHg; WBC > 12,000/uL OR < 4,000/uL OR > 10% immature bands. Score = number of criteria met (0-4). SIRS is considered present if score >= 2.

condition_rules.respiratory: RR > 20 OR PaCO2 < 32 counts as 1 point (not both)
condition_rules.wbc: > 12000 or < 4000 or bands > 10% counts as 1 point (not all three)
